notes: VIX steady at 18.8 with no fresh macro/news shocks, but the tape is split: SPY green while QQQ/IWM soft (-3.3%/-2.6%) and Big Tech still bleeding (META -7.2%, TSLA -24.8%). Holding neutral 0.4 and keeping deep losers plus the parabolic WLDS (+19.7%) off the buy list.
journal_entry: Fri 7/24 10:18: staying neutral 0.4, VIX flat 18.8, no new headlines. Growth/small-caps lag (QQQ -3.3%, IWM -2.6%) while defensives (ABT, SPY, REZI, VOD, WAB) hold up; TSLA/META/PLTK remain landmines. Added WLDS to avoid after a +19.7% parabolic pop. Watching whether oil relief holds and if Big Tech stabilizes.
